title: Information Security Policy
body: The Information Security Policy outlines the company's approach to protecting information assets. All employees must adhere to the access control and acceptable use guidelines defined herein.

title: Data Retention Policy
body: This policy governs data retention periods for all company records. Financial records, including transaction logs, invoices, and accounting ledgers, are retained for 5 years from the end of the fiscal year. After the retention period, records should be securely destroyed in accordance with the Data Destruction Policy.

title: Access Control Policy
body: Access to systems and data must be granted based on the principle of least privilege. All access requests require manager approval and are reviewed quarterly.
